project.name: branding
project.description: Governs all brand, design, and content decisions for the Debmalya & Ankita wedding website. Use when adding new sections, components, copy, colors, typography, or interactive features.

project.name: formatter
project.description: Formats HTML, CSS, and JS files using Prettier. Use when asked to format, prettify, lint-fix, or tidy source files.

project.name: commiter
project.description: Automates git commit workflow: inspect working tree, stage relevant files, write a structured commit message with emoji convention, commit, and verify. Use when asked to commit, create a git commit, or save changes to git.
